abort.single_instance_allowed: Only a single instance of SSH Command is allowed.

execute.name: Execute SSH Command
execute.description: Executes a specified command on a remote server via SSH.

host.name: Host
host.description: Hostname or IP address of the remote server.

key_file.name: Key File
key_file.description: Path to the SSH private key file for key-based authentication.

command.name: Command
command.description: The command to execute on the host.

script_file.name: Script File
script_file.description: Path to the script file to execute on the host.

check_known_hosts.name: Check Known Hosts
check_known_hosts.description: Whether to verify the host against the known hosts file.

known_hosts.name: Known Hosts
known_hosts.description: Known hosts in a valid format for asyncssh.

timeout.name: Timeout
timeout.description: Maximum time to wait for the command to complete (in seconds).

username_password_both_required.message: When providing a username, also provide a password and vice versa.

username_password_or_key_file.message: Either username/password or key file must be provided.

command_or_script_file.message: Either command or script file must be provided.

known_hosts_with_check_disabled.message: Known hosts provided while check known hosts is disabled.

host_key_not_verifiable.message: The host key could not be verified.
